title: Exe_craft_Tweaks
description: client-side modpack with some tweaks chosen by me like xaeros minimap and auto fish, it doesnt really change the game play, just enhances it
body: This mod pack,contains Xaeros minimap and world map to help you get lost in the Minecraft world. It doesn't really change the gameplay, it just improves it with tweaks like the minimap, autofish and more
